summary: Verified property card image overlap fix on Stay page. Cards now follow proper structure: 1) Card wrapper has overflow-hidden rounded-2xl, 2) Image header is fixed height (150px mobile, 180px desktop) with overflow-hidden, 3) Content section is separate div with bg-white, 4) Badges limited to 4 with +N indicator, 5) CTA buttons always visible at bottom.

issues: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop - Check render method of StayPage (minor React warning, doesn't affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: PropertyCard component (line 1590-1687) follows proper card structure with overflow-hidden on both card wrapper and image container
Image header uses h-[150px] sm:h-[180px] for responsive fixed heights
Content section correctly uses bg-white and flex-grow for proper layout
Badges limited to 4 with +N indicator when more exist
Minor: React key warning in StayPage render method - consider adding unique keys to mapped elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Property card image overlap bug is FIXED. Cards display correctly on all viewports (iPhone SE 375x667, iPhone 14 390x844, Desktop 1920x1080). Image stays within fixed height header, content section has white background with no overlap.
